prompt: Re-extract tech-requirements.md for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. The existing file has TR-01 through TR-07 with reviewed_at: 2026-04-20. The file is at docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/tech-requirements.md and one of the existing UX-sourced TRs has a source link that no longer resolves (the source UX section was renamed).

assertions.name: preserves_TR_01_through_07
assertions.check: Resulting tech-requirements.md still has headings TR-01 through TR-07 (numbering not changed).

assertions.name: no_renumbering
assertions.check: No existing TR was renumbered to a different identifier.

assertions.name: stale_link_flagged_not_deleted
assertions.check: The TR whose source no longer resolves is marked with a ⚠️ flag (or equivalent 'source no longer resolves' marker) and is NOT deleted.

assertions.name: new_TRs_appended_starting_at_TR_08
assertions.check: Any newly-discovered TR uses identifier TR-08 or higher (not reusing earlier numbers).

assertions.name: reviewed_at_nulled_or_flagged
assertions.check: Either `reviewed_at` is set back to null in the resulting file, or the response explicitly tells the user it must be re-set before plan-adrs proceeds.

assertions.name: mentions_git_diff_or_living_doc
assertions.check: Response mentions that this is a living doc / git diff is the review surface (or equivalent framing).
